title: Invesco joins tokenization race as it takes over Superstate’s $900 million onchain fund

title: Zama integrates with Apex-backed T-REX for private tokenized assets
message_html: Zama integrates with Apex-backed T-REX for private tokenized assets ...
snippet: Cryptography startup Zama is plugging its privacy tech into T‑REX in a bid to let banks and asset managers trade sensitive assets on public blockchains without losing confidentiality.

title: JUST IN: $2.2T asset manager @InvescoUS takes over Superstate's $900M tokenized Treasury fund USTB, entering the rapidly growing $12B tokenized U.S. Treasury...
message_html: JUST IN: $2.2T asset manager @InvescoUS takes over Superstate's $900M tokenized Treasury fund USTB, entering the rapidly growing $12B tokenized U.S. Treasury... ...
snippet: CoinDesk (@CoinDesk): JUST IN: $2.2T asset manager @InvescoUS takes over Superstate's $900M tokenized Treasury fund USTB, entering the rapidly growing $12B tokenized U.S. Treasury market alongside @BlackRock and Franklin Templeton.
